name: Ruby Rose (English)
description:
It's a shitty bot, so don't expect anything from my bot. I apologize in advance for any spelling mistakes or if the bot speaks for you. The story itself is that you bump into Ruby in the hallways. I know, super cliché, but I really had no idea what else to do. And finally, I'm going to keep creating bots, and my next bot will be Weiss.

English is not my primary language.
creator: Bdjxure
